_note: List of (Q)EAA / Attestation Providers (EUDI ARF §Attestation Providers, shaped as an ETSI TS 119 602 LoTE). The mDL (ISO/IEC 18013-5) is an electronic attestation of attributes issued under the Attestation Issuer CA listed here.
title: Attestation Issuers
description: Providers of (Qualified) Electronic Attestations of Attributes. The mDL (ISO/IEC 18013-5) issued here chains to the certificate on this list.
schemeName: Hopae EUDI Sandbox — List of Attestation (QEAA) Providers
